

ข้ามไปที่เนื้อหา
การใช้ Gmail กับโปรแกรมอ่านหน้าจอ
in:spam 
เปิดการแจ้งเตือนในเดสก์ท็อปสำหรับ Gmail
   ตกลง  ไม่ ขอบคุณ
DAB12 HTML_DashBoard
จดหมายขยะ
rosakorn raksujarit <t.rosakorn@gmail.com>
ไฟล์แนบ
26 มิ.ย. 2026 21:22 (14 ชั่วโมงที่ผ่านมา)
ถึง ornjira_trairat, ฉัน, aprdm.ngor, jaja.sirapitcha

ทำไมข้อความนี้จึงอยู่ในจดหมายขยะ ข้อความนี้มีลักษณะคล้ายกับข้อความที่เคยระบุว่าเป็นจดหมายขยะ
รายงานว่าไม่ใช่จดหมายขยะ
ดูเหมือนว่าข้อความนี้จะเป็นอังกฤษ

 2 ไฟล์แนบ
  •  สแกนโดย Gmail

  'wellness_survey_done_v16_1','wellness_playroom_me_v16_1','wellness_playroom_records_v16_1','wellness_hidden_bucket_v16_1',
  'wellness_survey_done_v16_2','wellness_playroom_me_v16_2','wellness_playroom_records_v16_2','wellness_hidden_bucket_v16_2'
];
legacyStorageKeys.forEach(function(k){ localStorage.removeItem(k); });

function qs(id){return document.getElementById(id)}
function safeParse(raw, fallback){
  try{return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : fallback;}
  catch(e){return fallback;}
}
function clearSurveyStorage(){
  [storageDoneKey,storageMeKey,storageRecordsKey,storageHiddenKey].concat(legacyStorageKeys).forEach(function(k){ localStorage.removeItem(k); });
}


// === V16.3 Supabase layer — built on stable V15 flow ===
// วิธีใช้:
// 1) Run ไฟล์ SQL ที่แนบให้ใน Supabase SQL Editor
// 2) วาง Project URL และ anon public key ด้านล่าง
// 3) ถ้ายังไม่วางค่า เว็บจะยังเล่นได้ แต่จะเป็น Demo Mode ในเครื่องผู้เล่น
const SUPABASE_URL = 'PASTE_YOUR_SUPABASE_PROJECT_URL_HERE';
const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'PASTE_YOUR_SUPABASE_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY_HERE';
const SUPABASE_IS_CONFIGURED = /^https:\/\/.+\.supabase\.co\/?$/.test(SUPABASE_URL) && SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.startsWith('eyJ');
const ADMIN_MODE = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('admin') === '1';
if(ADMIN_MODE){ document.documentElement.classList.add('admin-mode'); }
let supabaseClient = null;
function getSupabaseClient(){
  if(!SUPABASE_IS_CONFIGURED) return null;
  if(supabaseClient) return supabaseClient;
  if(!window.supabase || !window.supabase.createClient){
    console.warn('Supabase SDK not loaded. Falling back to local demo mode.');
    return null;
  }
  supabaseClient = window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
  return supabaseClient;
}
function answerToText(index, value){
  const q = Q[index] || {o:[]};
  if(Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(function(v){ return q.o[v] || String(v); }).join(' | ');
  if(value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return '';
  return q.o[value] || String(value);
}
function buildAnswersJson(answerSet){
  const usedAnswers = answerSet || answers;
  return Q.map(function(q, index){
    return {
      question_no: index + 1,
      chapter_no: (q.c || 0) + 1,
      question: q.t,
      answer: answerToTextFromSet(index, usedAnswers[index]),
      raw_answer: usedAnswers[index],
      is_multi_select: !!q.multi
    };
  });
}
function answerToTextFromSet(index, value){
  const q = Q[index] || {o:[]};
  if(Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(function(v){ return q.o[v] || String(v); }).join(' | ');
  if(value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return '';
  return q.o[value] || String(value);
}
function buildSurveyRow(me){
  const a = resolveAnimal(me.animal || {key:me.animalKey});
  const usedAnswers = me.answers || answers;
  const row = {
    player_id: me.id,
    created_at: me.createdAt,
    nickname: me.nick || '',
    instagram: me.ig || '',
    email: me.email || '',
    result_animal_key: a.key || me.animalKey || '',
    result_animal_name: a.name || '',
    buddy_animal_key: a.buddyKey || '',
    buddy_animal_name: a.buddy || '',
    top_theme: me.topTheme || '',
    score_soc: Number((me.score||{}).SOC || 0),
    score_trd: Number((me.score||{}).TRD || 0),
    score_esc: Number((me.score||{}).ESC || 0),
    score_hlt: Number((me.score||{}).HLT || 0),
    score_grw: Number((me.score||{}).GRW || 0),
    score_dat: Number((me.score||{}).DAT || 0),
    score_rtn: Number((me.score||{}).RTN || 0),
    score_idn: Number((me.score||{}).IDN || 0),
    scores_json: me.score || {},
    answers_json: buildAnswersJson(usedAnswers),
    source_version: 'v16_3_final_from_v15',
    page_url: location.href.split('#')[0],
    user_agent: navigator.userAgent
  };
  for(let i=0;i<Q.length;i++){
    const n = String(i+1).padStart(2,'0');
    row['q' + n + '_answer'] = answerToTextFromSet(i, usedAnswers[i]);
  }
  return row;
}
function buildPlayerRow(me){
  const a = resolveAnimal(me.animal || {key:me.animalKey});
  return {
    player_id: me.id,
    created_at: me.createdAt,
    nickname: me.nick || '',
    instagram: me.ig || '',
    animal_key: a.key || me.animalKey || '',
    animal_name: a.name || '',
    buddy_key: a.buddyKey || '',
    buddy_name: a.buddy || '',
    source_version: 'v16_3_final_from_v15'
  };
}
function mapPlayerRowToRecord(row){
  const animal = resolveAnimal({key: row.animal_key, name: row.animal_name});
  return {
    id: row.player_id,
    nick: row.nickname,
    ig: row.instagram,
    animal: animal,
    animalKey: animal.key,
    createdAt: row.created_at
  };
}
async function saveSurveyToSupabase(me){
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  if(!client) return {ok:false, mode:'demo', reason:'not_configured'};
  const surveyInsert = await client.from('survey_responses').insert(buildSurveyRow(me));
  if(surveyInsert.error) throw surveyInsert.error;
  const playerInsert = await client.from('players').insert(buildPlayerRow(me));
  if(playerInsert.error) throw playerInsert.error;
  return {ok:true, mode:'supabase'};
}
async function loadPlayersFromSupabase(){
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  if(!client) return [];
  const {data, error} = await client
    .from('players')
    .select('player_id,nickname,instagram,animal_key,animal_name,created_at')
    .order('created_at', {ascending:false})
    .limit(40);
  if(error){
    console.warn('Unable to load players from Supabase. Falling back to local demo records.', error);
    return [];
  }
  return (data || []).reverse().map(mapPlayerRowToRecord);
}
async function getPlayRoomRecords(localRecords){
  const remoteRecords = await loadPlayersFromSupabase();
  return mergeUniqueRecords(localRecords || [], remoteRecords || []);
}
function mergeUniqueRecords(localRecords, remoteRecords){
  const seen = new Set();
  return [...(localRecords||[]), ...(remoteRecords||[])].filter(function(r){
    const id = r && r.id;
    if(!id || seen.has(id)) return false;
    seen.add(id);
    return true;
  });
}
function rowToCsvValue(value){
  if(value === null || value === undefined) return '';
  const text = typeof value === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(value) : String(value);
  return '"' + text.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"';
}
function downloadRowsAsCsv(rows, filename){
  if(!rows || !rows.length){ alert('ยังไม่มีข้อมูลให้ Export'); return; }
  const baseColumns = [
    'created_at','player_id','nickname','instagram','email','result_animal_key','result_animal_name','buddy_animal_key','buddy_animal_name','top_theme',
    'score_soc','score_trd','score_esc','score_hlt','score_grw','score_dat','score_rtn','score_idn'
  ];
  const qColumns = Array.from({length:Q.length}, function(_,i){ return 'q' + String(i+1).padStart(2,'0') + '_answer'; });
  const columns = baseColumns.concat(qColumns).concat(['scores_json','answers_json','source_version','page_url']);
  const csv = [columns.join(',')].concat(rows.map(function(row){
    return columns.map(function(col){ return rowToCsvValue(row[col]); }).join(',');
  })).join('\n');
  const blob = new Blob(['\ufeff' + csv], {type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;'});
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = filename || 'wellness_playroom_survey_responses.csv';
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  a.remove();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}
async function exportCsv(){
  const client = getSupabaseClient();
  if(client){
    const {data, error} = await client
      .from('survey_responses')
      .select('*')
      .order('created_at', {ascending:true});
    if(!error && Array.isArray(data)){
      downloadRowsAsCsv(data, 'wellness_playroom_survey_responses_supabase.csv');
      return;
    }
    console.warn('Supabase export failed. Falling back to local export.', error);
  }
  const localRecords = safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageRecordsKey),[]);
  const rows = localRecords.map(function(me){ return buildSurveyRow(me); });
  downloadRowsAsCsv(rows, 'wellness_playroom_survey_responses_local.csv');
}
function showScreen(id){
  ['hero','chapterIntro','questionScreen','leadScreen','thankyouScreen','resultScreen'].forEach(function(x){ qs(x).classList.remove('active'); });
  if(id) qs(id).classList.add('active');
  if(id==='hero' || !id){ qs('progressWrap').classList.remove('active'); }
  else { qs('progressWrap').classList.add('active'); }
}
async function showExistingResult(){
  const me=safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageMeKey),null);
  const localRecords=safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageRecordsKey),[]);
  if(me){
    const records = await getPlayRoomRecords(localRecords);
    window.__latestMe = me;
    window.__latestRecords = records;
    renderResult(me, records);
    return;
  }
  clearSurveyStorage();
  qs('startBtn').textContent='เริ่มเล่นเลย';
  showScreen('hero');
}
async function startFlow(){
  if(localStorage.getItem(storageDoneKey)==='true' && localStorage.getItem(storageMeKey)){
    await showExistingResult();
    return;
  }
  maybeShowChapterIntro();
}
function maybeShowChapterIntro(){
  const chapterIndex=Q[current].c;
  if(shownChapterIntro!==chapterIndex){renderChapterIntro(chapterIndex); showScreen('chapterIntro'); shownChapterIntro=chapterIndex; updateProgress();}
  else {renderQuestion(); showScreen('questionScreen'); updateProgress();}
}
function renderChapterIntro(chIdx){
  const ch=chapters[chIdx];
  qs('chapterIntro').innerHTML=`<div class="chapter-card"><div class="chapter-chip">${ch.chip}</div><h2>${ch.title}</h2><div class="chapter-text">${ch.text}</div><div class="chapter-cta"><button class="pink" onclick="enterChapterQuestions()">${ch.cta}</button></div><div class="chapter-scene">${renderScene(ch.anim)}</div></div>`;
}
function humanHTML(extraClass=''){
  return `<div class="pixel-human ${extraClass}"><div class="hair"></div><div class="head"></div><div class="body"></div><div class="arm-l"></div><div class="arm-r"></div><div class="leg-l"></div><div class="leg-r"></div><div class="shoe-l"></div><div class="shoe-r"></div></div>`;
}
function renderScene(key){
  const tree = `<div class="tree-trunk" style="left:36px"></div><div class="tree-top" style="left:7px"></div>`;
  const sunCloud = `<div class="sky-sun"></div><div class="cloud-a"></div>`;
  const scenes={
    wake:`<div class="mini-scene scene-wake">${sunCloud}<div class="bed"></div><div class="blanket"></div>${humanHTML('wake-person')}<div class="floor"></div></div>`,
    stretch:`<div class="mini-scene scene-stretch">${sunCloud}<div class="tree-trunk" style="left:236px"></div><div class="tree-top" style="left:206px"></div>${humanHTML('stretch-person')}<div class="grass"></div></div>`,
    shoe:`<div class="mini-scene scene-shoe"><div class="cloud-a"></div><div class="shoe-piece left"></div><div class="shoe-piece right"></div>${humanHTML('shoe-person')}<div class="floor"></div></div>`,
    park:`<div class="mini-scene scene-park">${sunCloud}${tree}<div class="tree-trunk" style="left:245px"></div><div class="tree-top" style="left:214px"></div>${humanHTML('walker')}<div class="path"></div></div>`,
    data:`<div class="mini-scene scene-data">${sunCloud}<div class="watch-dot"></div>${humanHTML('walker')}<div class="path"></div></div>`,
    meal:`<div class="mini-scene scene-meal"><div class="cloud-a"></div><div class="meal-table"></div><div class="meal-bowl"></div>${humanHTML('stretch-person')}<div class="floor"></div></div>`,
    sleep:`<div class="mini-scene scene-sleep"><div class="moon"></div><div class="zzz z1">Z</div><div class="zzz z2">Z</div><div class="zzz z3">Z</div><div class="bed"></div><div class="blanket"></div><div class="floor"></div></div>`
  };
  return scenes[key] || scenes.park;
}
function enterChapterQuestions(){renderQuestion(); showScreen('questionScreen'); updateProgress();}
function renderQuestion(){
  const q=Q[current];
  const htmlParts=[];
  htmlParts.push(`<div class="card">`);
  htmlParts.push(`<div class="question-title">${q.t}</div>`);
  htmlParts.push(`<div class="options">`);
  q.o.forEach((op,i)=>{
    const sel=q.multi ? (answers[current]||[]).includes(i) : answers[current]===i;
    htmlParts.push(`<label class="option ${sel?'selected':''}"><input type="${q.multi?'checkbox':'radio'}" name="q${current}" ${sel?'checked':''} onchange="selectAns(${i})"> ${op}</label>`);
  });
  htmlParts.push(`</div>`);
  const nextLabel=(current===Q.length-1)?'ไปเจอเพื่อนของฉัน' : 'ไปต่อ';
  htmlParts.push(`<div class="nav"><button class="secondary" onclick="prevQ()" ${current===0?'disabled':''}>กลับ</button><button onclick="nextQ()">${nextLabel}</button></div></div>`);
  qs('questionScreen').innerHTML=htmlParts.join('');
}
function selectAns(i){
  const q=Q[current];
  if(q.multi){
    const noneIndex=q.o.length-1;
    let arr=answers[current]||[];
    if(i===noneIndex){
      arr=arr.includes(i)?[]:[i];
    }else{
      arr=arr.filter(x=>x!==noneIndex);
      arr=arr.includes(i)?arr.filter(x=>x!==i):[...arr,i];
    }
    answers[current]=arr;
  }
  else answers[current]=i;
  renderQuestion();
}
function nextQ(){
  const q=Q[current];
  if(q.multi){ if(!answers[current] || answers[current].length===0){alert('เลือกอย่างน้อย 1 ข้อก่อนน้า'); return;} }
  else if(answers[current]===null){ alert('เลือกคำตอบก่อนน้า'); return; }
  if(current<Q.length-1){
    const nextChapter=Q[current+1].c;
    current++;
    if(nextChapter!==Q[current-1].c) maybeShowChapterIntro();
    else {renderQuestion(); updateProgress();}
  } else {
    renderLead(); showScreen('leadScreen'); updateProgress(100);
  }
}
function prevQ(){
  if(current===0) return;
  current--;
  renderQuestion(); showScreen('questionScreen'); updateProgress();
}
function updateProgress(force){
  const v=typeof force==='number'?force:Math.max(6, Math.round((current/Q.length)*100));
  qs('bar').style.width=Math.min(100,v)+'%';
}
function renderLead(){
  qs('leadScreen').innerHTML=`<div class="card lead-card"><div class="question-title">ใกล้ถึง Play Room แล้ว 🌳<br>ขอป้ายชื่อตัวละครหน่อยนะ</div><div class="lead-grid"><div><label>ชื่อเล่น</label><input id="nickname" type="text" placeholder="เช่น DAB" autocomplete="nickname" /></div><div><label>@IG <span class="optional-label">ไม่บังคับ</span></label><input id="ig" type="text" placeholder="เช่น @DAB.12 หรือเว้นว่างได้" autocomplete="off" /></div></div><div class="help">ชื่อเล่นจะแสดงบนตัวละครของคุณใน Play Room ส่วน IG จะใส่หรือไม่ใส่ก็ได้</div><div class="nav"><button class="secondary" onclick="showScreen('questionScreen');renderQuestion();updateProgress();">กลับ</button><button class="green" onclick="submitSurvey()">เข้าป่าเลย</button></div></div>`;
}
function calc(){
  const score=Object.fromEntries(themes.map(t=>[t,0]));
  answers.forEach((ans,idx)=>{
    const q=Q[idx];
    const arr=q.multi?(ans||[]):[ans];
    arr.forEach(a=>{ if(a!==null && q.s[a]) Object.entries(q.s[a]).forEach(([k,v])=>score[k]+=v); });
  });
  const sorted=Object.entries(score).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
  let topKey=sorted[0][0];
  let animal=animals[topKey] || animals.BAL;
  if(sorted[0][1]<=4 || (sorted[0][1]-sorted[Math.min(2,sorted.length-1)][1] <=1)) animal=animals.BAL;
  return {score,sorted,animal,topKey};
}
function escapeHtml(str){return String(str||'').replace(/[&<>"']/g,m=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[m]));}
function animalAvatar(key){
  const meta={
    swan:{emoji:'🦢',label:'swan'}, rabbit:{emoji:'🐰',label:'rabbit'}, turtle:{emoji:'🐢',label:'turtle'}, cat:{emoji:'🐱',label:'cat'},
    dog:{emoji:'🐶',label:'dog'}, otter:{emoji:'🦦',label:'otter'}, crow:{emoji:'🐦‍⬛',label:'crow'}, pig:{emoji:'🐷',label:'pig'}
  };
  const m=meta[key]||meta.pig;
  return `<div class="animal-avatar animal-${m.label}"><div class="animal-avatar-bg"></div><div class="animal-avatar-emoji">${m.emoji}</div></div>`;
}
function demoForestFriends(){
  return [
    {id:'d1',nick:'Mint',ig:'@runwithmint',animal:animals.RTN},
    {id:'d2',nick:'Ploy',ig:'@sleepy.plant',animal:animals.ESC},
    {id:'d3',nick:'Beam',ig:'@beam.moves',animal:animals.DAT},
    {id:'d4',nick:'Jai',ig:'@jai.journey',animal:animals.HLT},
    {id:'d5',nick:'Noon',ig:'@noon.club',animal:animals.SOC},
    {id:'d6',nick:'Korn',ig:'@korn.nomad',animal:animals.TRD},
    {id:'d7',nick:'Mew',ig:'@mewglow',animal:animals.IDN},
    {id:'d8',nick:'Boo',ig:'@balanceboo',animal:animals.BAL}
  ];
}
function renderPlayRoom(records,currentId){
  const base=[...demoForestFriends(),...records].slice(-18);
  const spots=[[6,342,88,12],[16,228,74,10],[29,395,96,15],[42,255,74,12],[54,410,82,11],[68,282,68,16],[82,420,86,12],[10,500,80,14],[24,540,68,11],[38,470,85,13],[52,565,72,15],[64,515,79,12],[78,560,88,14],[88,465,64,10],[4,250,72,12],[72,210,66,13],[58,220,58,9],[34,210,62,11]];
  return base.map((r,i)=>{const s=spots[i%spots.length]; const me=r.id===currentId; return `<div class="critter ${me?'me':''}" style="left:${s[0]}%;top:${s[1]}px;--range:${s[2]}px;--dur:${s[3]}s"><div class="tag">${escapeHtml(r.nick||'นักเดินทาง')}<small>${escapeHtml(r.ig||'@anonymous')}</small></div>${animalAvatar((r.animal&&r.animal.key)||r.animalKey||'pig')}</div>`;}).join('');
}
async function submitSurvey(){
  const nick=qs('nickname').value.trim();
  const ig=qs('ig').value.trim();
  const email='';
  if(!nick){ alert('ใส่ชื่อเล่นก่อนน้า'); return; }
  const submitBtn = document.querySelector('#leadScreen button.green');
  if(submitBtn){ submitBtn.disabled=true; submitBtn.textContent='กำลังส่งตัวละครเข้าป่า...'; }
  try{
    currentResult=calc();
    const id='u'+Date.now()+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7);
    const me={id,nick,ig,email,animal:currentResult.animal,animalKey:currentResult.animal.key,createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),answers:[...answers],score:currentResult.score,topTheme:currentResult.topKey};
    const localRecords=safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageRecordsKey),[]);
    localRecords.push(me);
    localStorage.setItem(storageRecordsKey,JSON.stringify(localRecords));
    localStorage.setItem(storageHiddenKey,JSON.stringify(localRecords.map(r=>({createdAt:r.createdAt,nick:r.nick,ig:r.ig,email:r.email,animal:(r.animal&&r.animal.name)||r.animal,topTheme:r.topTheme,score:r.score,answers:r.answers}))));
    localStorage.setItem(storageMeKey,JSON.stringify(me));
    localStorage.setItem(storageDoneKey,'true');
    window.__latestMe = me;

    try{
      await saveSurveyToSupabase(me);
    }catch(err){
      console.warn('Supabase save failed. Local demo still works.', err);
      if(SUPABASE_IS_CONFIGURED){
        alert('บันทึกลง Supabase ยังไม่สำเร็จ แต่ยังดูผลลัพธ์ได้ก่อนนะ\n\nให้เช็ก SQL table / RLS policy / URL / anon key อีกครั้ง');
      }
    }

    const records = await getPlayRoomRecords(localRecords);
    window.__latestRecords = records;
    renderThankYou(me, records);
  }finally{
    if(submitBtn){ submitBtn.disabled=false; submitBtn.textContent='เข้าป่าเลย'; }
  }
}
function renderThankYou(me, records){
  const a=me.animal;
  qs('thankyouScreen').innerHTML=`<div class="card thankyou-card"><div class="thankyou-inner"><div class="thankyou-badge">THANK YOU ✨</div><div class="thankyou-title">เจอตัวละครของคุณแล้ว!</div><div class="thankyou-text">พร้อมเข้า Play Room ไปเจอเพื่อนที่จังหวะคล้ายกันหรือยัง?</div><div class="thankyou-animal">${animalAvatar(a.key)}</div><div class="nav thankyou-nav"><button class="green" onclick="goToResultFromStorage()">ดูผลลัพธ์</button></div></div></div>`;
  showScreen('thankyouScreen');
  updateProgress(100);
}
async function goToResultFromStorage(){
  const me = window.__latestMe || safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageMeKey),null);
  const localRecords = safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageRecordsKey),[]);
  const records = await getPlayRoomRecords(window.__latestRecords || localRecords);
  window.__latestRecords = records;
  if(me) renderResult(me, records);
}
function resolveAnimal(animalLike){
  if(!animalLike) return animals.BAL;
  const key = animalLike.key || animalLike.animalKey || animalLike.buddyKey;
  const found = Object.values(animals).find(function(x){return x.key===key || x.name===animalLike.name;});
  return found || animalLike || animals.BAL;
}
function resultTagline(animalLike){
  const a=resolveAnimal(animalLike);
  return a.tag || 'สายดูแลตัวเองในแบบของคุณ';
}
function renderResult(me, records){
  const a=resolveAnimal(me.animal || {key:me.animalKey});
  const buddyAnimal=Object.values(animals).find(function(x){return x.key===a.buddyKey;}) || animals.BAL;
  const resultHTML=`
    <div class="result-card result-v14-shell">
      <div class="result-v14-head">
        <div>
          <div class="result-v14-title">WELLNESS&nbsp;&nbsp; PLAY ROOM</div>
          <div class="result-v14-subtitle">WHAT A COINCIDENCE</div>
        </div>
        <div class="result-v14-title" aria-hidden="true">✦ ✧</div>
      </div>
      <div class="canvas-wrap">
        <canvas id="resultCanvas" class="result-canvas" width="1080" height="1920"></canvas>
        <img id="storyPreview" class="story-preview v14-preview" alt="ภาพผลลัพธ์ 9:16" />
      </div>
      <div class="result-v14-actions">
        <button class="pink" onclick="copyLink()">Copy Link</button>
        <button class="secondary admin-only" onclick="exportCsv()">Export CSV</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="playroom">
      <div class="playroom-title"><h2>Play Room 🌳</h2><p>ปล่อยตัวละครของคุณมาเดินเล่น แล้วเจอเพื่อนที่จังหวะคล้ายกัน</p></div>
      <div class="forest">
        <div class="tree" style="left:7%"></div>
        <div class="tree" style="left:28%;bottom:130px"></div>
        <div class="tree" style="left:52%;bottom:115px"></div>
        <div class="tree" style="left:84%;bottom:128px"></div>
        <div class="pond"></div>
        <div class="flower" style="left:16%;bottom:90px"></div>
        <div class="flower" style="left:58%;bottom:102px"></div>
        <div class="flower" style="left:74%;bottom:86px"></div>
        <div class="path"></div>
        ${renderPlayRoom(records, me.id)}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  qs('resultScreen').innerHTML=resultHTML;
  showScreen('resultScreen');
  qs('progressWrap').classList.add('active');
  updateProgress(100);
  drawResultCanvas(Object.assign({}, me, {animal:a, animalKey:a.key}));
}
function drawSpriteOnCanvas(ctx,key,x,y,size){
  const palette=spritePalettes[key] || spritePalettes.pig;
  const rows=sprites[key] || sprites.pig;
  const cell=size || 8;
  rows.forEach(function(row,ry){
    Array.from(row).forEach(function(ch,rx){
      if(ch==='.') return;
      ctx.fillStyle=palette[ch] || 'transparent';
      if(ctx.fillStyle !== 'transparent') ctx.fillRect(x+(rx*cell), y+(ry*cell), cell, cell);
    });
  });
}
function setFitFont(ctx,text,maxWidth,startSize,weight,family){
  let size=startSize;
  const fam=family || 'Mali';
  const w=weight || '800';
  do{
    ctx.font=w+' '+size+'px '+fam;
    if(ctx.measureText(text).width<=maxWidth) break;
    size-=2;
  }while(size>=28);
  return size;
}
function drawPixelGrass(ctx,x,y,w,h){
  ctx.fillStyle='#a7d98f'; ctx.fillRect(x,y,w,h);
  ctx.strokeStyle='#25275a'; ctx.lineWidth=6; ctx.strokeRect(x,y,w,h);
  ctx.fillStyle='#78bd73';
  for(let i=0;i<12;i++) ctx.fillRect(x+18+i*34, y-8-(i%2)*8, 18, 18);
  ctx.fillStyle='#f8f4eb'; ctx.fillRect(x+20,y+h-14,w-40,8);
}
function drawMiniPixelSparkles(ctx,x,y){
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f'; ctx.fillRect(x,y,10,10); ctx.fillRect(x+10,y+10,10,10); ctx.fillRect(x-10,y+10,10,10); ctx.fillRect(x,y+20,10,10);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ffd56b'; ctx.fillRect(x+58,y+4,8,8); ctx.fillRect(x+66,y+12,8,8); ctx.fillRect(x+50,y+12,8,8); ctx.fillRect(x+58,y+20,8,8);
}

  const lines={

    turtle:['เต่าพาไปทีละก้าว','หงส์ช่วยจำปลายทาง','คู่นี้เลยไปไกลแบบไม่หลุดทาง'],
    cat:['แมวเติมใจให้ได้พัก','กระต่ายเติมจังหวะให้กลับมาเริ่ม','คู่นี้พักได้ แต่ไม่หายไปจากตัวเอง'],

}
function drawPixelCloud(ctx,x,y,scale){
  const s=scale||1;
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.86)';
  ctx.fillRect(x,y,42*s,18*s); ctx.fillRect(x+18*s,y-18*s,36*s,18*s); ctx.fillRect(x+54*s,y,36*s,18*s);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(146,196,228,.40)';
  ctx.fillRect(x+8*s,y+18*s,104*s,8*s);
}
function drawPixelFlower(ctx,x,y,color){
  ctx.fillStyle=color || '#ff628f';
  ctx.fillRect(x,y,14,14); ctx.fillRect(x-14,y+14,14,14); ctx.fillRect(x+14,y+14,14,14); ctx.fillRect(x,y+28,14,14);
  ctx.fillStyle='#4da45f'; ctx.fillRect(x+2,y+42,8,36);
}
function drawPixelLandscape(ctx){
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(58,123,122,.30)';
  ctx.fillRect(32,980,78,260); ctx.fillRect(110,1090,62,150); ctx.fillRect(904,990,78,250); ctx.fillRect(982,1080,66,160);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(72,147,88,.38)';
  for(let i=0;i<32;i++) ctx.fillRect(32+i*34,1810+(i%3)*12,18,18);
  drawPixelFlower(ctx,102,1710,'#ff628f');
  drawPixelFlower(ctx,958,1718,'#ffd56b');
}
function drawRoundedPanel(ctx,x,y,w,h,fill,stroke,line,radius){
  ctx.save();
  ctx.fillStyle=fill; ctx.strokeStyle=stroke; ctx.lineWidth=line||6;
  const r=radius||28;
  if(ctx.roundRect){
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect(x,y,w,h,r); ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
  }else{
    pixelPanel(ctx,x,y,w,h,fill,stroke,line);
  }
  ctx.restore();
}
function drawCornerPixels(ctx,x,y,w,h,color){
  ctx.fillStyle=color || '#9fc8e9';
  [[x+20,y+24],[x+34,y+10],[x+w-44,y+24],[x+w-30,y+10],[x+20,y+h-44],[x+34,y+h-30],[x+w-44,y+h-44],[x+w-30,y+h-30]].forEach(function(p){ ctx.fillRect(p[0],p[1],12,12); });
}
function drawHeroBadge(ctx){
  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,338,78,404,74,'#fffaf0','#25275a',6,18);
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic';
  ctx.fillStyle='#25275a'; ctx.font='700 23px "Press Start 2P", monospace';
  ctx.fillText('WELLNESS PLAY ROOM',540,126);
}
function drawSparkle(ctx,x,y,color,size){
  const s=size||12;
  ctx.fillStyle=color;
  ctx.fillRect(x,y,s,s); ctx.fillRect(x+s,y+s,s,s); ctx.fillRect(x-s,y+s,s,s); ctx.fillRect(x,y+s*2,s,s);
}
function drawPixelGrass(ctx,x,y,w,h){
  ctx.fillStyle='#a8d97d'; ctx.fillRect(x,y,w,h);
  ctx.strokeStyle='#25275a'; ctx.lineWidth=6; ctx.strokeRect(x,y,w,h);
  ctx.fillStyle='#58b668';
  for(let i=0;i<Math.floor(w/28);i++) ctx.fillRect(x+14+i*28, y-12-(i%2)*7, 16, 18);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(48,107,61,.42)';
  for(let i=0;i<Math.floor(w/34);i++) ctx.fillRect(x+10+i*34, y+h-22, 12, 12);
  ctx.fillStyle='#f8f4eb'; ctx.fillRect(x+24,y+h-18,w-48,8);
}
function drawMiniPixelSparkles(ctx,x,y){
  drawSparkle(ctx,x,y,'#ff628f',10);
  drawSparkle(ctx,x+58,y+4,'#ffd56b',8);
}
function fitText(ctx,text,maxWidth,startSize,minSize,weight,family){
  let size=startSize;
  const fam=family || 'Mali';
  const w=weight || '800';
  while(size>=minSize){
    ctx.font=w+' '+size+'px '+fam;
    if(ctx.measureText(text).width<=maxWidth) return size;
    size-=2;
  }
  ctx.font=w+' '+minSize+'px '+fam;
  return minSize;
}
function drawTextLinesCenter(ctx,lines,x,y,maxWidth,startSize,lineHeight,fill,weight){
  ctx.fillStyle=fill||'#25275a';
  ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic';
  lines.forEach(function(line,i){
    fitText(ctx,line,maxWidth,startSize,22,weight||'800','Mali');
    ctx.fillText(line,x,y+i*lineHeight);
  });
}
function drawTextLinesCenterBlock(ctx,lines,x,y,maxWidth,startSize,lineHeight,fill,weight){
  ctx.fillStyle=fill||'#25275a';
  ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic';
  lines.forEach(function(line,i){
    fitText(ctx,line,maxWidth,startSize,20,weight||'800','Mali');
    ctx.fillText(line,x,y+i*lineHeight);
  });
}
function drawTextLinesLeft(ctx,lines,x,y,maxWidth,startSize,lineHeight,fill,weight){
  ctx.fillStyle=fill||'#25275a';
  ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic';
  lines.forEach(function(line,i){
    fitText(ctx,line,maxWidth,startSize,20,weight||'800','Mali');
    ctx.fillText(line,x,y+i*lineHeight);
  });
}
function drawSpriteAnchored(ctx,key,centerX,baseY,cell){
  const rows=sprites[key] || sprites.pig;
  const width=(rows[0]||'').length*cell;
  const height=rows.length*cell;
  drawSpriteOnCanvas(ctx,key,centerX-width/2,baseY-height,cell);
}

function drawEmojiTextGroup(ctx, emoji, text, x, y, maxWidth, startSize, minSize, color, weight){
  const gap = 14;
  let size = startSize;
  const emojiSize = Math.round(startSize * .86);
  while(size >= minSize){
    ctx.font=(weight||'900')+' '+size+'px Mali';
    const textW = ctx.measureText(text).width;
    const totalW = emojiSize + gap + textW;
    if(totalW <= maxWidth) break;
    size -= 2;
  }
  ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic';
  ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.font=Math.round(size*.88)+'px serif';
  const textWFinal = (() => { ctx.font=(weight||'900')+' '+size+'px Mali'; return ctx.measureText(text).width; })();
  const emojiW = Math.round(size*.92);
  const startX = x - (emojiW + gap + textWFinal)/2;
  ctx.font=Math.round(size*.86)+'px serif';
  ctx.fillStyle=color||'#25275a';
  ctx.fillText(emoji, startX, y);
  ctx.font=(weight||'900')+' '+size+'px Mali';
  ctx.fillText(text, startX + emojiW + gap, y);
  ctx.textAlign='center';
}

function drawResultCanvas(me){
  const c=qs('resultCanvas');
  const ctx=c.getContext('2d');
  const a=resolveAnimal(me.animal || {key:me.animalKey});
  const buddyAnimal = Object.values(animals).find(function(x){return x.key===a.buddyKey;}) || animals.BAL;
  const nick = me.nick || 'นักเดินทาง';
  const ig = me.ig ? me.ig : '—';
  const descLines=resultStoryLines(a);
  const buddyLines=buddyStoryLines(a);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
  ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled=false;

  const bg=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,c.height);
  bg.addColorStop(0,'#cfeaf5');
  bg.addColorStop(.38,'#fff6d8');
  bg.addColorStop(.70,'#cbe7b6');
  bg.addColorStop(1,'#85c978');
  ctx.fillStyle=bg; ctx.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
  drawPixelCloud(ctx,44,250,1.16);
  drawPixelCloud(ctx,928,248,1.04);
  drawPixelLandscape(ctx);
  ctx.fillStyle='#25275a';
  ctx.fillRect(0,0,c.width,30); ctx.fillRect(0,c.height-30,c.width,30); ctx.fillRect(0,0,30,c.height); ctx.fillRect(c.width-30,0,30,c.height);

  drawSparkle(ctx,178,124,'#ff628f',18);
  drawSparkle(ctx,886,126,'#ffd56b',18);
  drawSparkle(ctx,276,282,'#6fbd68',10);
  drawSparkle(ctx,806,282,'#6fbd68',10);
  drawHeroBadge(ctx);
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic';
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f'; ctx.font='700 21px "Press Start 2P", monospace';
  ctx.fillText('WHAT A COINCIDENCE',540,204);
  ctx.fillStyle='#25275a'; ctx.font='900 86px Mali';
  ctx.fillText('คุณคือ...',540,315);
  ctx.fillStyle='#8fc8ec'; ctx.fillRect(458,356,44,8); ctx.fillRect(578,356,44,8);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f'; ctx.fillRect(526,340,18,18); ctx.fillRect(508,358,18,18); ctx.fillRect(544,358,18,18); ctx.fillRect(526,376,18,18);

  const panelX=74, panelY=420, panelW=932, panelH=870;
  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,panelX,panelY,panelW,panelH,'#fffaf0','#25275a',7,26);
  drawCornerPixels(ctx,panelX,panelY,panelW,panelH,'#9fc8e9');
  drawSparkle(ctx,208,572,'#ffd56b',12); drawSparkle(ctx,842,572,'#ffd56b',12); drawSparkle(ctx,247,675,'#9fc8e9',9); drawSparkle(ctx,805,680,'#9fc8e9',9);

  const heroCell = a.key==='swan' ? 35 : (a.key==='otter' || a.key==='crow' ? 33 : 34);
  const baseY=780;
  drawPixelGrass(ctx,326,baseY-42,428,98);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(90,125,160,.24)';
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(540,baseY+58,310,38,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
  drawSpriteAnchored(ctx,a.key,540,baseY,heroCell);

  drawEmojiTextGroup(ctx,a.emoji,a.name,540,915,700,54,34,'#25275a','900');
  ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f';
  fitText(ctx,resultTagline(a),690,36,26,'900','Mali');
  ctx.fillText(resultTagline(a),540,970);
  drawTextLinesCenterBlock(ctx,descLines,540,1055,710,29,42,'#25275a','800');

  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,196,1190,300,68,'#fffaf0','#25275a',4,4);
  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,584,1190,300,68,'#fffaf0','#25275a',4,4);
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillStyle='#25275a';
  fitText(ctx,nick,250,30,20,'900','Mali'); ctx.fillText(nick,346,1234);
  fitText(ctx,ig,250,30,20,'900','Mali'); ctx.fillText(ig,734,1234);

  const buddyY=1344;
  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,74,buddyY,932,350,'#f6fbec','#2a6b3a',6,24);
  drawCornerPixels(ctx,74,buddyY,932,350,'#82bd72');
  ctx.textAlign='left'; ctx.fillStyle='#25275a';
  fitText(ctx,'🤝 Buddy ที่เหมาะกับคุณ',600,42,29,'900','Mali');
  ctx.fillText('🤝 Buddy ที่เหมาะกับคุณ',140,buddyY+82);
  drawEmojiTextGroup(ctx,buddyAnimal.emoji,a.buddy,332,buddyY+154,520,35,25,'#25275a','900');
  ctx.textAlign='left';
  drawTextLinesLeft(ctx,buddyLines,140,buddyY+210,555,27,38,'#25275a','800');
  drawPixelGrass(ctx,720,buddyY+232,205,64);
  drawSpriteAnchored(ctx,buddyAnimal.key,822,buddyY+242,18);
  drawSparkle(ctx,648,buddyY+188,'#ffd56b',8); drawSparkle(ctx,910,buddyY+162,'#9fc8e9',8);

  ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f'; ctx.font='700 17px "Press Start 2P", monospace';
  ctx.fillText('♥   WHAT A COINCIDENCE   ♥',540,1814);
  drawTextLinesCenterBlock(ctx,['มาเล่นแล้วดูว่าเธอเป็นสัตว์อะไร','ในป่า Wellness'],540,1850,700,25,32,'#25275a','800');

  const preview=qs('storyPreview');
  if(preview){
    try{
      preview.src=c.toDataURL('image/png');
      preview.alt='ภาพผลลัพธ์ 9:16';
    }catch(err){
      console.error('Unable to render story image',err);
      preview.removeAttribute('src');
      preview.alt='ขออภัย โหลดภาพผลลัพธ์ไม่สำเร็จ';
      const note=document.createElement('div');
      note.className='notice';
      note.textContent='โหลดภาพผลลัพธ์ไม่สำเร็จ ลองกดเล่นใหม่หรือเปิดบนเบราว์เซอร์อีกครั้งนะ';
      preview.parentNode && preview.parentNode.appendChild(note);
    }
  }
}

function pixelPanel(ctx,x,y,w,h,fill,stroke,line){
  ctx.fillStyle=fill; ctx.fillRect(x,y,w,h); ctx.strokeStyle=stroke; ctx.lineWidth=line||4; ctx.strokeRect(x,y,w,h);
}
function centerText(ctx,text,x,y){ const w=ctx.measureText(text).width; ctx.fillText(text,x-w/2,y); }
function splitUnits(text){
  if(!text) return [];
  if(text.includes(' ')) return text.split(/(\s+)/).filter(Boolean);
  return Array.from(text);
}
function wrapTextCenter(ctx,text,x,y,maxWidth,lineHeight){
  const units=splitUnits(text); let line=''; let lines=[];
  for(let n=0;n<units.length;n++){
    const unit=units[n];
    const test=line+unit;
    if(ctx.measureText(test).width>maxWidth && line){ lines.push(line.trim()); line=unit.trimStart ? unit.trimStart() : unit; }
    else line=test;
  }
  if(line) lines.push(line.trim());
  lines.forEach((ln,i)=>centerText(ctx,ln,x,y+i*lineHeight));
}
function wrapText(ctx,text,x,y,maxWidth,lineHeight){
  const units=splitUnits(text); let line=''; let yy=y;
  for(let n=0;n<units.length;n++){
    const unit=units[n];
    const test=line+unit;
    if(ctx.measureText(test).width>maxWidth && line){ ctx.fillText(line.trim(),x,yy); line=unit.trimStart ? unit.trimStart() : unit; yy+=lineHeight; }
    else line=test;
  }
  if(line) ctx.fillText(line.trim(),x,yy);
}

// V6 override// V6 override: keep the working survey, but render Play Room characters as clearer 8-bit walking animals.
function v6SpriteFrameHtml(frame, palette, className){
  var html = '<div class="sprite-frame ' + (className || '') + '">';
  var chars = frame.join('').split('');
  for(var i=0; i<chars.length; i++){
    var ch = chars[i];
    if(ch === '.'){
      html += '<span class="cell"></span>';
    }else{
      html += '<span class="cell" style="background:' + (palette[ch] || 'transparent') + '"></span>';
    }
  }
  html += '</div>';
  return html;
}
function v6WalkingAnimal(key){
  var palette = spritePalettes[key] || spritePalettes.pig;
  var base = sprites[key] || sprites.pig;
  var alt = base.slice();
  var last = alt[alt.length-3] || alt[alt.length-1];
  if(key === 'rabbit'){ alt[9]='...KWWWK.....'; alt[11]='...K..K......'; }
  else if(key === 'swan'){ alt[10]='...K..K..K...'; }
  else if(key === 'turtle'){ alt[8]='...K..K..K...'; }
  else if(key === 'cat'){ alt[7]='...K.K.......'; alt[8]='..K...K.KK...'; }
  else if(key === 'dog'){ alt[7]='...K.K.......'; alt[9]='...K.K.......'; }
  else if(key === 'otter'){ alt[7]='....KBBBK....'; alt[8]='...KBBBBBK...'; }
  else if(key === 'crow'){ alt[8]='..K...K......'; }
  else if(key === 'pig'){ alt[7]='...K.K.......'; }
  return '<div class="walk-pixel-animal">' + v6SpriteFrameHtml(base,palette,'frame-a') + v6SpriteFrameHtml(alt,palette,'frame-b') + '</div>';
}
function v6StaticAnimal(key){
  var palette = spritePalettes[key] || spritePalettes.pig;
  var base = sprites[key] || sprites.pig;
  return '<div class="static-pixel-animal">' + v6SpriteFrameHtml(base,palette,'') + '</div>';
}
animalAvatar = function(key){
  return v6StaticAnimal(key || 'pig');
};
renderPlayRoom = function(records,currentId){
  var base = demoForestFriends().concat(records).slice(-18);
  var spots = [[5,342,86,11],[16,228,78,10],[29,395,92,14],[42,255,82,12],[54,410,88,11],[68,282,74,15],[82,420,94,12],[10,500,84,14],[24,540,76,11],[38,470,88,13],[52,565,80,15],[64,515,86,12],[78,560,92,14],[88,465,70,10],[4,250,74,12],[72,210,68,13],[58,220,64,9],[34,210,70,11]];
  return base.map(function(r,i){
    var s = spots[i % spots.length];
    var me = r.id === currentId;
    var key = (r.animal && r.animal.key) || r.animalKey || 'pig';
    return '<div class="critter walking ' + (me ? 'me' : '') + '" style="left:' + s[0] + '%;top:' + s[1] + 'px;--range:' + s[2] + 'px;--dur:' + s[3] + 's"><div class="tag">' + escapeHtml(r.nick || 'นักเดินทาง') + '<small>' + escapeHtml(r.ig || '—') + '</small></div>' + v6WalkingAnimal(key) + '</div>';
  }).join('');
};


function copyLink(){
  const url=window.location.href.split('#')[0];
  if(navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText){
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function(){ alert('คัดลอกลิงก์แล้ว 💌'); }).catch(function(){ prompt('Copy link', url); });
  }else{ prompt('Copy link', url); }
}

function restartJourney(){
  clearSurveyStorage();
  window.__latestMe = null;
  window.__latestRecords = null;
  current = 0;
  answers = Array(Q.length).fill(null);
  shownChapterIntro = null;
  currentResult = null;
  qs('startBtn').textContent='เริ่มเล่นเลย';
  qs('bar').style.width='0%';
  showScreen('hero');
}

function normalizeOptionalIg(value){
  const text=(value || '').trim();
  if(!text) return '';
  return text.startsWith('@') ? text : '@' + text;
}

// replace the submit handler so IG is optional and email is fully removed
submitSurvey = async function(){
  const nick=qs('nickname').value.trim();
  const ig=normalizeOptionalIg(qs('ig').value);
  const email='';
  if(!nick){ alert('ใส่ชื่อเล่นก่อนน้า'); return; }
  const submitBtn = document.querySelector('#leadScreen button.green');
  if(submitBtn){ submitBtn.disabled=true; submitBtn.textContent='กำลังส่งตัวละครเข้าป่า...'; }
  try{
    currentResult=calc();
    const id='u'+Date.now()+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7);
    const me={id,nick,ig,email,animal:currentResult.animal,animalKey:currentResult.animal.key,createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),answers:[...answers],score:currentResult.score,topTheme:currentResult.topKey};
    const localRecords=safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageRecordsKey),[]);
    localRecords.push(me);
    localStorage.setItem(storageRecordsKey,JSON.stringify(localRecords));
    localStorage.setItem(storageHiddenKey,JSON.stringify(localRecords.map(r=>({createdAt:r.createdAt,nick:r.nick,ig:r.ig,email:r.email,animal:(r.animal&&r.animal.name)||r.animal,topTheme:r.topTheme,score:r.score,answers:r.answers}))));
    localStorage.setItem(storageMeKey,JSON.stringify(me));
    localStorage.setItem(storageDoneKey,'true');
    window.__latestMe = me;

    try{
      await saveSurveyToSupabase(me);
    }catch(err){
      console.warn('Supabase save failed. Local demo still works.', err);
      if(SUPABASE_IS_CONFIGURED){
        alert('บันทึกลง Supabase ยังไม่สำเร็จ แต่ยังดูผลลัพธ์ได้ก่อนนะ\n\nให้เช็ก SQL table / RLS policy / URL / anon key อีกครั้ง');
      }
    }

    const records = await getPlayRoomRecords(localRecords);
    window.__latestRecords = records;
    renderThankYou(me, records);
  }finally{
    if(submitBtn){ submitBtn.disabled=false; submitBtn.textContent='เข้าป่าเลย'; }
  }
};

// more compact Play Room labels to prevent mobile overflow
renderPlayRoom = function(records,currentId){
  var base = demoForestFriends().concat(records).slice(-18);
  var spots = [[5,342,72,11],[16,228,68,10],[29,395,76,14],[42,255,70,12],[54,410,72,11],[68,282,62,15],[80,420,62,12],[10,500,70,14],[24,540,64,11],[38,470,70,13],[52,565,64,15],[64,515,66,12],[76,560,62,14],[84,465,52,10],[4,250,58,12],[70,210,56,13],[56,220,52,9],[34,210,58,11]];
  return base.map(function(r,i){
    var s = spots[i % spots.length];
    var me = r.id === currentId;
    var key = (r.animal && r.animal.key) || r.animalKey || 'pig';
    var igText = r.ig ? escapeHtml(r.ig) : '';
    return '<div class="critter walking ' + (me ? 'me' : '') + '" style="left:' + s[0] + '%;top:' + s[1] + 'px;--range:' + s[2] + 'px;--dur:' + s[3] + 's"><div class="tag">' + escapeHtml(r.nick || 'นักเดินทาง') + (igText ? '<small>' + igText + '</small>' : '') + '</div>' + v6WalkingAnimal(key) + '</div>';
  }).join('');
};

  const a=resolveAnimal(animalLike);
  const lines={
    swan:['มองสุขภาพเป็นเรื่องระยะยาว','ไม่รีบ แต่รู้ว่าปลายทางสำคัญ'],
    rabbit:['ใช้ตัวเลขอ่านจังหวะร่างกาย','เห็น progress แล้วใจฟู'],

    cat:['พักให้ใจได้หายใจ','แล้วค่อยกลับไปไหว'],
    dog:['มีพลังเมื่อได้ขยับกับเพื่อน','ไปด้วยกันสนุกกว่าไปคนเดียว'],
    otter:['ดูแลตัวเองให้ฟีลดีขึ้น','เป็นเวอร์ชันที่ชอบและอยากแชร์'],

    pig:['ดูแลตัวเองแบบไม่กดดัน','เข้ากับชีวิตจริงได้ก็ยิ่งสุข']
  };
  return lines[a.key] || ['ดูแลตัวเองในแบบที่เป็นคุณ','ค่อย ๆ ไปต่อในจังหวะของตัวเอง'];
}
function v18BuddyStoryLines(animalLike){
  const a=resolveAnimal(animalLike);
  const lines={
    swan:['ค่อย ๆ ไป แต่ไปจริง','ช่วยให้หงส์ลงมือได้ทีละก้าว'],
    rabbit:['กระต่ายตั้งเป้า แมวเตือนให้พัก','progress เลยไม่กลายเป็น pressure'],
    turtle:['เต่ามีวินัย หงส์เห็นปลายทาง','อยู่ด้วยกันแล้วไม่หลุดง่าย'],
    cat:['แมวเติมใจ กระต่ายเติมจังหวะ','พักได้ แต่ยังไม่หายไปจากตัวเอง'],
    dog:['โกลเด้นชวนคน นากชวนเล่น','ทำให้ Play Room อบอุ่นไม่เงียบ'],
    otter:['นากทำให้ทุกอย่างน่าแชร์','โกลเด้นทำให้อบอุ่นและไปต่อได้'],
    crow:['อีกาพาเปิดโลก หมูช่วยบาลานซ์','ลองของใหม่ได้แบบไม่หลุดตัวเอง'],
    pig:['หมูพาให้อยู่กับตัวเองเป็นมิตร','อีกาช่วยเติมความสดใหม่ให้ชีวิต']
  };
  return lines[a.key] || ['อยู่ด้วยกันแล้วจังหวะดีขึ้น','ช่วยให้ไปต่อได้ง่ายกว่าเดิม'];
}
function v18FitFont(ctx,text,maxWidth,startSize,minSize,weight,family){
  let size=startSize;
  const fam=family || 'Mali';
  const w=weight || '800';
  while(size>=minSize){
    ctx.font=w+' '+size+'px '+fam;
    if(ctx.measureText(text).width<=maxWidth) return size;
    size-=2;
  }
  ctx.font=w+' '+minSize+'px '+fam;
  return minSize;
}
function v18Tokenize(text){
  const t=String(text||'').trim();
  if(!t) return [];
  if(t.includes(' ')) return t.split(/(\s+)/).filter(Boolean);
  // Thai often has no spaces. Force soft character wrapping as a last resort.
  return Array.from(t);
}
function v18WrapLines(ctx,text,maxWidth,fontSize,weight,family){
  const units=v18Tokenize(text);
  const fam=family || 'Mali';
  const w=weight || '800';
  ctx.font=w+' '+fontSize+'px '+fam;
  let line='', out=[];
  units.forEach(function(unit){
    const test=line+unit;
    if(line && ctx.measureText(test).width>maxWidth){
      out.push(line.trim());
      line=unit.trimStart ? unit.trimStart() : unit;
    }else{
      line=test;
    }
  });
  if(line.trim()) out.push(line.trim());
  return out;
}
function v18DrawWrappedCenter(ctx,lines,x,y,maxWidth,startSize,minSize,lineHeight,fill,weight){
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic'; ctx.fillStyle=fill||'#25275a';
  let all=[];
  lines.forEach(function(line){
    const size=v18FitFont(ctx,line,maxWidth,startSize,minSize,weight||'800','Mali');
    const wrapped=v18WrapLines(ctx,line,maxWidth,size,weight||'800','Mali');
    wrapped.forEach(function(w){ all.push({text:w,size:size}); });
  });
  all.forEach(function(item,i){
    ctx.font=(weight||'800')+' '+item.size+'px Mali';
    ctx.fillText(item.text,x,y+i*lineHeight);
  });
  return y + Math.max(0, all.length-1)*lineHeight;
}
function v18DrawWrappedLeft(ctx,lines,x,y,maxWidth,startSize,minSize,lineHeight,fill,weight){
  ctx.textAlign='left'; ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic'; ctx.fillStyle=fill||'#25275a';
  let yy=y;
  lines.forEach(function(line){
    const size=v18FitFont(ctx,line,maxWidth,startSize,minSize,weight||'800','Mali');
    const wrapped=v18WrapLines(ctx,line,maxWidth,size,weight||'800','Mali');
    wrapped.forEach(function(w){
      ctx.font=(weight||'800')+' '+size+'px Mali';
      ctx.fillText(w,x,yy);
      yy+=lineHeight;
    });
  });
  return yy;
}

// Override only the story image generator. This fixes the phone screenshot overflow without changing quiz flow.
drawResultCanvas = function(me){
  const c=qs('resultCanvas');
  const ctx=c.getContext('2d');
  const a=resolveAnimal(me.animal || {key:me.animalKey});
  const buddyAnimal = Object.values(animals).find(function(x){return x.key===a.buddyKey;}) || animals.BAL;
  const nick = me.nick || 'นักเดินทาง';
  const ig = me.ig || '—';
  const descLines=v18ResultStoryLines(a);
  const buddyLines=v18BuddyStoryLines(a);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
  ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled=false;

  const bg=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,c.height);
  bg.addColorStop(0,'#cfeaf5'); bg.addColorStop(.38,'#fff6d8'); bg.addColorStop(.70,'#cbe7b6'); bg.addColorStop(1,'#85c978');
  ctx.fillStyle=bg; ctx.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
  drawPixelCloud(ctx,44,250,1.16); drawPixelCloud(ctx,928,248,1.04); drawPixelLandscape(ctx);
  ctx.fillStyle='#25275a'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,c.width,30); ctx.fillRect(0,c.height-30,c.width,30); ctx.fillRect(0,0,30,c.height); ctx.fillRect(c.width-30,0,30,c.height);

  drawSparkle(ctx,178,124,'#ff628f',18); drawSparkle(ctx,886,126,'#ffd56b',18); drawSparkle(ctx,276,282,'#6fbd68',10); drawSparkle(ctx,806,282,'#6fbd68',10);
  drawHeroBadge(ctx);
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic'; ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f'; ctx.font='700 21px "Press Start 2P", monospace'; ctx.fillText('WHAT A COINCIDENCE',540,204);
  ctx.fillStyle='#25275a'; ctx.font='900 86px Mali'; ctx.fillText('คุณคือ...',540,315);
  ctx.fillStyle='#8fc8ec'; ctx.fillRect(458,356,44,8); ctx.fillRect(578,356,44,8);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f'; ctx.fillRect(526,340,18,18); ctx.fillRect(508,358,18,18); ctx.fillRect(544,358,18,18); ctx.fillRect(526,376,18,18);

  const panelX=74, panelY=420, panelW=932, panelH=870;
  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,panelX,panelY,panelW,panelH,'#fffaf0','#25275a',7,26);
  drawCornerPixels(ctx,panelX,panelY,panelW,panelH,'#9fc8e9');
  drawSparkle(ctx,208,572,'#ffd56b',12); drawSparkle(ctx,842,572,'#ffd56b',12); drawSparkle(ctx,247,675,'#9fc8e9',9); drawSparkle(ctx,805,680,'#9fc8e9',9);

  const heroCell = a.key==='swan' ? 34 : (a.key==='otter' || a.key==='crow' ? 31 : 32);
  const baseY=762;
  drawPixelGrass(ctx,326,baseY-42,428,98);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(90,125,160,.24)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(540,baseY+58,310,38,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
  drawSpriteAnchored(ctx,a.key,540,baseY,heroCell);

  const safeW=700;
  v18DrawWrappedCenter(ctx,[`${a.emoji} ${a.name}`],540,913,safeW,52,34,54,'#25275a','900');
  v18DrawWrappedCenter(ctx,[resultTagline(a)],540,975,660,34,25,40,'#ff628f','900');
  v18DrawWrappedCenter(ctx,descLines,540,1062,650,30,23,42,'#25275a','800');

  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,196,1190,300,68,'#fffaf0','#25275a',4,4);
  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,584,1190,300,68,'#fffaf0','#25275a',4,4);
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillStyle='#25275a';
  v18FitFont(ctx,nick,250,30,20,'900','Mali'); ctx.fillText(nick,346,1234);
  v18FitFont(ctx,ig,250,30,20,'900','Mali'); ctx.fillText(ig,734,1234);

  const buddyY=1344;
  drawRoundedPanel(ctx,74,buddyY,932,350,'#f6fbec','#2a6b3a',6,24);
  drawCornerPixels(ctx,74,buddyY,932,350,'#82bd72');
  ctx.textAlign='left'; ctx.fillStyle='#25275a';
  v18FitFont(ctx,'🤝 Buddy ที่เหมาะกับคุณ',610,44,28,'900','Mali'); ctx.fillText('🤝 Buddy ที่เหมาะกับคุณ',128,buddyY+86);
  v18FitFont(ctx,`${buddyAnimal.emoji} ${a.buddy}`,540,34,24,'900','Mali'); ctx.fillText(`${buddyAnimal.emoji} ${a.buddy}`,128,buddyY+158);
  v18DrawWrappedLeft(ctx,buddyLines,128,buddyY+216,545,27,21,38,'#25275a','800');
  drawPixelGrass(ctx,728,buddyY+230,205,64);
  drawSpriteAnchored(ctx,buddyAnimal.key,828,buddyY+242,18);
  drawSparkle(ctx,652,buddyY+186,'#ffd56b',8); drawSparkle(ctx,912,buddyY+160,'#9fc8e9',8);

  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillStyle='#ff628f'; ctx.font='700 18px "Press Start 2P", monospace'; ctx.fillText('♥   WHAT A COINCIDENCE   ♥',540,1818);
  ctx.font='800 26px Mali'; ctx.fillStyle='#25275a';
  v18DrawWrappedCenter(ctx,['มาเล่นแล้วดูว่าเธอเป็นสัตว์อะไรในป่า Wellness'],540,1866,820,26,21,32,'#25275a','800');

  const preview=qs('storyPreview');
  if(preview){
    try{ preview.src=c.toDataURL('image/png'); preview.alt='ภาพผลลัพธ์ 9:16'; }
    catch(err){ console.error('Unable to render story image',err); preview.removeAttribute('src'); preview.alt='ขออภัย โหลดภาพผลลัพธ์ไม่สำเร็จ'; }
  }
};



// --- V17.2 play room mobile-safe critter positions + crisper preview ---
function isPhoneViewport(){
  return Math.min(window.innerWidth || 9999, window.screen && window.screen.width || 9999) <= 430;
}
function playRoomLabel(record, mobile){
  const nick = escapeHtml(record.nick || 'นักเดินทาง');
  const ig = record.ig ? '<small>' + escapeHtml(record.ig) + '</small>' : '';
  return mobile ? nick : (nick + ig);
}
renderPlayRoom = function(records,currentId){
  const mobile = isPhoneViewport();
  const demo = demoForestFriends();
  const full = demo.concat(records || []);
  const limit = mobile ? 12 : 16;
  const base = full.slice(-limit);
  const desktopSpots = [
    [6,344,54,11],[16,234,52,10],[28,394,58,14],[40,254,50,12],
    [52,410,56,11],[64,286,48,15],[76,420,46,12],[10,500,52,14],
    [24,540,48,11],[38,470,54,13],[52,566,48,15],[64,516,46,12],
    [76,560,42,14],[84,468,36,10],[8,250,40,12],[70,214,38,13]
  ];
  const mobileSpots = [
    [9,314,18,11],[27,222,16,10],[45,334,18,12],[63,244,16,11],
    [13,430,18,12],[31,494,16,11],[50,410,16,12],[69,498,15,11],
    [18,554,12,12],[44,546,12,11],[66,566,10,12],[80,430,10,11]
  ];
  const spots = mobile ? mobileSpots : desktopSpots;
  return base.map(function(r,i){
    const s = spots[i % spots.length];
    const me = r.id === currentId;
    const key = (r.animal && r.animal.key) || r.animalKey || 'pig';
    return '<div class="critter walking ' + (me ? 'me' : '') + '" style="left:' + s[0] + '%;top:' + s[1] + 'px;--range:' + s[2] + 'px;--dur:' + s[3] + 's"><div class="tag">' + playRoomLabel(r, mobile) + '</div>' + v6WalkingAnimal(key) + '</div>';
  }).join('');
};

// refresh result screen on resize so Play Room labels stay inside frame across orientation / phone widths
(function(){
  let __wellnessResizeTimer;
  window.addEventListener('resize', function(){
    clearTimeout(__wellnessResizeTimer);
    __wellnessResizeTimer = setTimeout(function(){
      const resultScreen = qs('resultScreen');
      if(resultScreen && resultScreen.classList.contains('active')){
        const me = window.__latestMe || safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageMeKey),null);
        const localRecords = safeParse(localStorage.getItem(storageRecordsKey),[]);
        const records = window.__latestRecords || localRecords;
        if(me){ renderResult(me, records); }
      }
    }, 120);
  });
})();
